title: Durable repository shell automation
summary: Durable repository automation MUST live under bin/ as executable Bash shell files without file-type suffixes.
instructions: Durable repository automation scripts MUST live under bin/ as executable Bash shell files.
Durable bin/ script filenames MUST NOT include file-type suffixes such as .sh, .bash, .mjs, or .js; names MUST follow the unprefixed convention used by bin/pan.
The repository scripts/ directory MUST NOT contain durable automation; throwaway run-local scripts remain under runtime/logs/workflows/<run-id>/scripts/ per AUTO-001.
When durable automation must invoke Node or other interpreters, the bin/ entry MUST remain a thin Bash wrapper that delegates to the compiled artifact or external tool.
Agents MUST NOT add durable automation under scripts/ or introduce new bin/ file-type suffixes without an explicit governance change.
